Title: College Ball at USF
Description: Eric played college baseball at the University of San Francisco, grinding through the competitive college circuit. The foundation was being built — discipline, work ethic, and a deep love for the game.

Title: Drafted
Description: The dream became real. Eric was selected in the MLB Draft, proving that the years of sacrifice and dedication paid off. From college fields to professional baseball.

Title: First YouTube Upload
Description: Eric picked up a camera and started sharing his baseball journey online. What began as a passion project quickly resonated with fans who connected with his authenticity.

Title: The Bat Flip Heard Around the Internet
Description: One swing. One bat flip. Millions of views overnight. The internet found its new baseball personality and Eric went from player to creator overnight.
QuoteText: I checked my phone and thought it was broken. Millions of views.

Title: Building Through the Pandemic
Description: When baseball shut down, Eric doubled down on content. Daily uploads, creative challenges, and a community that kept growing stronger every day.

Title: Video with Tatis Jr.
Description: A DM turned into a phone call. A phone call turned into a collab. Eric linked up with Fernando Tatis Jr. and the baseball world took notice.
QuoteText: He's not just a content creator. He's one of us.

Title: 1 Million Subscribers
Description: The gold play button arrived. From a college ballplayer with a camera to 1 million subscribers. Eric proved that authenticity wins.
QuoteText: This isn't my achievement. This is ours.

Title: Baseball Influencer Superstar
Description: Eric has become one of the most recognized faces in baseball content creation. Genuine relationships with MLB stars, a loyal community of millions, and a brand built on authenticity.
